title: Spicy Ethiopian Beef Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy Ethiopian-inspired beef stir fry made with tender beef, crunchy vegetables, and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: 2 cups mixed vegetables (bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the gored, snappy, and gored, and cook for 1 minute.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and spices.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
